subcodes.first_line: Although the gate of presence and utterance is closed, yet through the grace of God the pathway of letters and messages remaineth open [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگرچه باب حضور و کلام مسدود است ولکن بفضل الله سبیل نامه و پیام مفتوح
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @unity; oneness of humanity, @the power of words; of speech, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
